context: Tests whether AppMigrationKit import/export review guidance catches progress, archiver, conversion, and app-group cleanup mistakes.

checklist.name: Stable progress
checklist.description: Rejects returning a newly created progress object from the import progress property.

checklist.name: Progress updates
checklist.description: Recommends storing one progress object and updating it incrementally during import.

checklist.name: Cancellation propagation
checklist.description: States that archiver cancellation errors should propagate rather than being caught or swallowed.

checklist.name: No conversion copy
checklist.description: Rejects creating an intermediate converted export package before archiving.

checklist.name: Append resources
checklist.description: Recommends archiving transportable files directly with resource append calls.

checklist.name: Avoid stalls
checklist.description: Mentions avoiding long gaps before or between archive append calls.

checklist.name: App container cleanup
checklist.description: States that on import error the system clears the containing app data container.

checklist.name: Group not cleared
checklist.description: States that app group containers are not cleared by the migration system on import error.

checklist.name: Group cleanup
checklist.description: Recommends clearing or staging relevant app group data before writing imported content.

checklist.name: Version handling
checklist.description: Mentions using source or resource version information to handle versioned imported data.
